title: rsa.rs: wolfhsm_rsa_get_size non-positive result uses Ffi inconsistently
description: In rsa.rs:67-71, when wolfhsm_rsa_get_size returns a non-positive value after a successful FFI call (rc==0), the code constructs Ffi{code: out_size, func: "wolfhsm_rsa_get_size: returned non-positive key size"}. This is actually a ProtocolError (server returned success but gave an impossible key size), not an FFI error in the wolfSSL sense. Once the ProtocolError variant from wolfssl-rs-1kp.14 exists, this site should be converted to ProtocolError{msg: "wolfhsm_rsa_get_size returned non-positive key size"}. Also note that out_size is a c_int so using it as the code field of Ffi{} conflates two different numeric namespaces. Tracking separately from wolfssl-rs-1kp.14 because the fix depends on that issue landing first.
